item.title: Eastern Conference Standings ()
item.description: Eastern Conference Standings () --------------------- Carolina Hurricanes – 104 pts (0.456) Tampa Bay Lightning – 102 pts (0.447) Buffalo Sabres – 100 pts (0.433) Toronto Maple Leafs – 78 pts (0.338) Florida Panthers – 77 pts (0.338) New York Rangers – 73 pts (0.316) Montreal Canadiens – 100 pts (0.439) Pittsburgh Penguins – 94 pts (0.407) Boston Bruins – 94 pts (0.407) New York Islanders – 89 pts (0.38) Ottawa Senators – 88 pts (0.386) Detroit Red Wings – 88 pts (0.386) Philadelphia Flyers – 88 pts (0.386) Columbus Blue Jackets – 88 pts (0.381) Washington Capitals – 87 pts (0.377) New Jersey Devils – 81 pts (0.355) ---------------------

item.title: Western Conference Standings ()
